name: Knock Balls PRO
description: Throw balls at structures to make them collapse but be careful not to exceed the allowed limit! Each saved ball will count double at the next level, take advantage of it to apply you! One-tap easy-to-learn controls with stunning visual effects and addictive gameplay mechanics.
